name: DATABASE_FAILURE
description: Database services are failing or timing out.

name: AUTHENTICATION_FAILURE
description: Repeated authentication failures may indicate brute-force activity.

name: DATA_BREACH
description: Potential data exposure or exfiltration activity.

name: MEMORY_OVERFLOW
description: Application memory exhaustion or overflow detected.

name: CRITICAL_ERROR
description: Generic high-signal error indicators in log messages.
